title: Finn and the Lion Cubs
synopsis: Little Finn discovers playful lion cubs in the warm savanna and learns about friendship through gentle play and exploration.

pages.text: Finn walks in the golden grass. The sun is warm.

illustration.description: A toddler boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking through tall golden savanna grass under a warm orange sunset sky, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes in warm colors
illustration.alt: Finn walking through golden savanna grass

pages.text: Look! Three little lion cubs play together.

illustration.description: Three fluffy lion cubs tumbling and playing in golden grass, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes in warm savanna colors, while a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes watches nearby
illustration.alt: Three lion cubs playing while Finn watches

pages.text: The cubs roll and tumble. Finn giggles.

illustration.description: Lion cubs rolling over each other in playful wrestling while a smiling toddler boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes claps his hands, painted with expressive gouache brushstrokes in warm orange and gold tones
illustration.alt: Lion cubs tumbling as Finn giggles with joy

pages.text: One cub comes close. Finn pets the soft fur gently.

illustration.description: A gentle lion cub nuzzling against a toddler boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes who is carefully petting its golden fur, painted with thick textured gouache strokes in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Finn gently petting a friendly lion cub

pages.text: The cubs yawn. Time for a nap in the warm grass.

illustration.description: Three sleepy lion cubs curled up together in golden grass while a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes sits peacefully nearby, painted with bold gouache brushstrokes under an orange sunset sky
illustration.alt: Lion cubs napping peacefully with Finn sitting nearby

pages.text: Finn waves goodbye. What a fun day with new friends!

illustration.description: A happy toddler boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes waving goodbye to sleeping lion cubs in golden savanna grass, painted with confident gouache brushstrokes in warm orange and gold colors
illustration.alt: Finn waving goodbye to his new lion cub friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: How many lion cubs did Finn see?
questions.explanation: Finn saw three little lion cubs playing together in the golden grass.

questions.question: What did Finn do when he saw the cubs playing?
questions.explanation: Finn giggled when he watched the cubs roll and tumble together.

questions.question: How did Finn pet the lion cub?
questions.explanation: Finn petted the lion cub's soft fur very gently, showing kindness to animals.
